SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.costestimation.filter

Class FilterCostEstimate

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.costestimation.UnitCostEstimateBaseClass
neqsim.process.costestimation.filter.FilterCostEstimate
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class FilterCostEstimate extends UnitCostEstimateBaseClass
Screening-level purchased equipment cost estimator for filter vessels.

The estimate combines a horizontal pressure-vessel correlation with cartridge element, nozzle, and instrumentation allowances. It intentionally uses the dimensions and element count produced by FilterMechanicalDesign so the process-level cost rollup reflects the same mechanical screening basis as the unit design.

Version:
1.0
Author:
esol

  • Method Details

    • setElementCostUSD

      public void setElementCostUSD(double elementCostUSD)
      Set the typical filter element cost.
      Parameters:
      elementCostUSD - element cost in USD per installed element, negative values are clamped to zero

    • setAuxiliariesFraction

      public void setAuxiliariesFraction(double auxiliariesFraction)
      Set the auxiliary-cost fraction for nozzles, skid, retainers, and instrumentation.
      Parameters:
      auxiliariesFraction - auxiliary fraction of vessel and element cost, negative values are clamped to zero

    • calcPurchasedEquipmentCost

      protected double calcPurchasedEquipmentCost()
      Calculate purchased equipment cost.

      Override this method in subclasses to provide equipment-specific cost correlations.

      Overrides:
      calcPurchasedEquipmentCost in class UnitCostEstimateBaseClass
      Returns:
      purchased equipment cost in USD

    • materialFactor

      private double materialFactor(String materialGrade)
      Estimate material multiplier from the mechanical design material grade.
      Parameters:
      materialGrade - material grade or material family string
      Returns:
      material purchase-cost multiplier
